heading: Effect on other statutes
label: 8322 Effect on other statutes
text: This subchapter does not restrict authority under a statute, other than this subchapter, to deny or withhold benefits authorized by statute.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 2288, “Sec. 9”, .Sept. 26, 1961Pub. L. 87–299, § 175 Stat. 646The words “and ” are omitted as unnecessary.section 3282 of Title 18Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

Retroactive Restoration of Annuity and Retired Pay; Redeposits of Contributions and Offsets, , , provided that:Section 2 of Pub. L. 87–29975 Stat. 648Sept. 26, 1961“(a)Subject to subsection (b) of this section, any person, including his survivor or beneficiary, to whom annuity or retired pay is not payable under the Act of [this subchapter], as in effect at any time prior to the date of enactment of this Act [], by reason of any conviction of an offense, any commission of a violation, any refusal to answer, or any absence under indictment, or under charges, for any offense, shall be restored the right to receive such annuity or retired pay for any and all periods for which he would have had the right to receive such annuity or retired pay if the Act of [this subchapter], had not been enacted, unless, under the amendment made by the first section of this Act [amending former chapter 31 of this title, now this subchapter, and , Crimes and Criminal Procedure], such annuity or retired pay remains nonpayable to such person, including his survivor or beneficiary.September 1, 1954Sept. 26, 1961September 1, 1954section 3282 of Title 18“(b)No annuity accrued or accruing, prior to, on, or after the date of enactment of this Act [], on account of the restoration, by reason of the amendment made by the first section of this Act [amending former chapter 31 of this title, now this subchapter, and ] and by reason of subsection (a) of this section, of the right to receive such annuity, shall be paid until any sum refunded under [former , now , prior to amendment ], as in effect prior to the date of enactment of such amendment [], is deposited or is collected by offset against the annuity.”Sept. 26, 1961Sept. 26, 1961Sept. 26, 1961section 3282 of Title 18section 3 of the Act of September 1, 1954section 2284 of this titlesection 8316 of this title
